task: GAP-EXPENSES Phase 2 Step 2 — the safe foundation seed (NO posting logic). Migration 202606151500 seeds one global 'Uncategorized Expenses' account (#6999, account_type='Expense', is_postable=true) in catalogs.accounts (the GL posting CoA; VERIFIED journal_entry_postings.account_id + chart_of_accounts_roles.account_id both FK catalogs.accounts; accounting.coa_account is the QBO mirror, not seeded here) + a per-company uncategorized_expense role in accounting.chart_of_accounts_roles for each active org.companies row (mirrors ap_control), and widens chart_of_accounts_roles_role_check (was 11 roles incl. expense_default, no uncategorized_expense) to add it. The role seed's ON CONFLICT uses the VERIFIED partial unique index uq_coa_roles_company_role_active (operating_company_id, role) WHERE is_active=true. COA_ROLE_VALUES (coa-roles/resolver.service.ts) gains 'uncategorized_expense' so resolveRoleAccountOptional can resolve it. Additive, idempotent, rollback noted. Accountant gate cleared: TRANSP = cash basis (books + MOR). Validated locally (applies clean, account seeds 6999/Expense/postable). EXPENSE_GL_POSTING_ENABLED stays OFF; this seed changes no behavior on its own (no posting until Step 3). FINANCIAL/guard_required: builder authors + SHOWS SQL → Jorge approves → branch-test on ci-migration-test → builder STOPS → GUARD verifies independently → Jorge merges. Never self-merge.
